title: Arlong Turns the Fight Savage
description: On pages 1–1, arlong turns the fight savage focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 1–1, arlong turns the fight savage focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
